Role: Real-time Systems Engineer

Mission:
Implement real-time functionality using WebSockets.

Uses skills:

- websockets.skill
- laravel.skill

Responsibilities:

- implement presence channels
- broadcast vote events
- broadcast reveal events
- broadcast user join/leave
- implement reveal countdown
- synchronize room state

Events:

user_joined
user_left
vote_submitted
reveal_started
emoji_sent
room_state_changed
